meta.title: Mycoplasma microti sp. nov., isolated from the respiratory tract of prairie voles (Microtus ochrogaster)
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: Mycoplasmas were isolated from the respiratory tracts of prairie voles (Microtus ochrogaster). This paper presents biochemical, serological and molecular genetic characterizations of those organisms and proposes a new species, Mycoplasma microti sp. nov. The type strain of Mycoplasma microti is strain IL371(T) (ATCC 700935(T)).
